products.name: Aura Wireless Earbuds
products.desc: True wireless earbuds with active noise cancelling and a 32-hour case battery. Touch controls, IPX5 sweat resistance.

products.name: Pulse Smart Fitness Band
products.desc: Tracks heart rate, sleep and steps with a week of battery life. Syncs to a companion app over Bluetooth.

products.name: Nova LED Strip Lights (5M)
products.desc: App-controlled RGB lighting with music sync and voice assistant support. Cuts to size, sticks to any wall.

products.name: Orbit Fast Wireless Charger
products.desc: 15W fast charging pad compatible with most phone cases. Slim aluminum body with a soft-glow LED ring.

products.name: Meridian Steel Chronograph
products.desc: A stainless-steel chronograph with sapphire-coated glass and a fold-over clasp. Water resistant to 50m.

products.name: Lumen Minimalist Watch
products.desc: A clean-dial watch with a genuine leather strap, built for everyday wear from desk to dinner.

products.name: Pulse X Smartwatch
products.desc: Full-color touchscreen smartwatch with call notifications, GPS tracking and 10-day battery life.

products.name: Aria Rose Gold Bracelet Watch
products.desc: A slim bracelet-style watch in rose gold plating with a mother-of-pearl dial face.

products.name: Halo LED Moon Lamp
products.desc: A 3D-printed moon replica lamp with 16 color modes and touch dimming. Runs on USB-C, no cords required at night.

products.name: Terra Ceramic Vase Set (3pc)
products.desc: A trio of hand-glazed ceramic vases in graduated sizes, built to anchor a shelf or console table.

products.name: Woven Macrame Wall Hanging
products.desc: Hand-knotted cotton cord wall art on a driftwood dowel. Adds texture to any bare wall in minutes.

products.name: Drift Abstract Canvas Print
products.desc: Gallery-wrapped canvas print with a soft abstract wash, ready to hang out of the box.

products.name: Precision 6-Piece Knife Set
products.desc: Forged high-carbon steel knives with a walnut block. Holds an edge through daily prep work.

products.name: Frotha Electric Milk Frother
products.desc: Hand-held frother that turns milk into café-style foam in under 30 seconds. USB-C rechargeable.

products.name: Grove Bamboo Cutting Board Set
products.desc: Three sustainably-sourced bamboo boards with juice grooves, sized for prep, serving and everyday use.

products.name: Flex Silicone Utensil Set (10pc)
products.desc: Heat-resistant silicone utensils on beechwood handles, safe for non-stick cookware up to 450°F.
